positive: A stylized, clean line-art illustration of a magnificent mystical owl perched on a stylized moonbeam, surrounded by minimalist constellations and branching bioluminescent forest foliage. The design must feature strong black outlines and varying shades of deep midnight blue, gold leaf accents, and emerald green highlights. Composition should be perfectly centered, creating a dramatic, high-contrast silhouette ideal for screen printing. Art Deco geometry mixed with natural elements. Vector art, highly detailed, perfect symmetry, clean negative space, vibrant glow effect, cinematic volumetric lighting, solid color blocks, centered composition.
